text:
@Captpan6  Dude this was very impressive for 2009 and it seems like it took alot of effort to make. How did you get the sentence mixing to be so good and what tools did you use to edit this? 

I'm surprised you're still around 11 years later.
author: @blacksmith4048

text: @blacksmith4048  Vegas was and still is what I use. The sentence mixing simply came naturally.
author: @Captpan6

text: @Captpan6  I looked up sony vegas and I saw it costs like $400 to buy online. Was it free back then?
author: @blacksmith4048

text: @blacksmith4048  You can buy older versions cheaper on Amazon. However, they are still going to be in the hundreds of dollars area. It was popular to have it pirated which is why a lot of people had it and still have it.
author: @Captpan6

text: @Captpan6  I would make one these if I had the editing software. I use a chromebook and they're a pain to use since you have to find the right apps. I can't even use Newgrounds anymore since flashplayer stopped using html. It sucks
author: @blacksmith4048

text: @blacksmith4048  If you can find a tool that works your only limit is your imagination.
author: @Captpan6

text: @Captpan6  Newgrounds stopped using the old flashplayer in late 2020. Do you have any idea which tools in chromebook to use?
author: @blacksmith4048

text: @blacksmith4048  I wouldn't know which video editor is the best from all the ones that appear in Google so all I can say is look for free trials and see what clicks.

text: @Captpan6  ok thanks. Will you be making more videos?

text: @blacksmith4048  I just released a new one
author: @Captpan6

author: @Captpan6

text: @Captpan6  What games do you usually play?
